title: Error executing stored procedure in Oracle Execute SQL node
symptom: When attempting to execute a stored procedure using the Oracle Execute SQL node, n8n returns an ORA-06550 error. However, the same procedure runs successfully in SQL Developer.
not_this_if: Executing standard SQL commands without issues
root_cause: The ORA-06550 error typically indicates a syntax error in the PL/SQL block. In this case, it may be due to incorrect formatting or a typo in the procedure call when executed through n8n.
fix_steps: Check the syntax of the stored procedure call in n8n.
Ensure the PL/SQL block is correctly formatted as 'BEGIN procedure_name; END;'.
agent_instruction: Correct the syntax of the stored procedure call in the Oracle Execute SQL node.
